summary: Phase 3 & 4: Partner Self-Service Plan Management and Partner Submissions Admin Review. All 27 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend flows tested end-to-end and working correctly: admin login, Plans tab with monthly_price/Public badge, partner login, Plan & Billing tab, upgrade plan (with pro-rata toast), downgrade request dialog, My Submissions tab, admin Partner Submissions tab with approve/reject flows, and plan change propagation verified.

minor.issue: Free Trial plan (seeded before schema update) is missing monthly_price and currency fields in DB. Returns plan without these fields. UI handles this gracefully with '—' fallback. E1 may want to backfill with: {monthly_price: 0, currency: 'GBP'} for consistency.

issues: Status filter Select component's data-testid='submissions-status-filter' is on the Select wrapper, not the trigger button — Playwright's is_visible check returns false even though the filter IS visually present. Minor testability issue only, not a functional bug.

feature_test_results.platform_admin_login: PASS — Login via 'automate-accounts' gateway code → email/password → admin panel
feature_test_results.partner_submissions_tab_in_platform_sect: PASS — Tab visible in PLATFORM section of admin sidebar with correct testid
feature_test_results.partner_submissions_renders: PASS — Table renders with search, status filter (defaulting to Pending), Approve/Reject buttons per pending row
feature_test_results.plans_tab_monthly_price_column: PASS — Plans table has Price column showing GBP 79.99/mo (Professional), GBP 29.99/mo (Starter), — (Free Trial)
feature_test_results.plans_tab_public_badge: PASS — Blue 'Public' badge shown for Professional and Starter plans
feature_test_results.plans_tab_edit_modal_monthly_price_curre: PASS — Edit Plan modal has Monthly Price input (plan-monthly-price-input), Currency input (plan-currency-input), and 'Visible to partners' checkbox (plan-is-public-checkbox)
feature_test_results.partner_login_flow: PASS — Enter 'test-partner-co' partner code → branded 'Test Partner Co' login → email/password → admin panel
feature_test_results.partner_plan_billing_tab: PASS — Shows current plan card (Starter GBP 29.99, active), Available Upgrades (Professional GBP 79.99 +GBP 50/mo), MY BILLING section in sidebar
feature_test_results.partner_upgrade_plan: PASS — Click 'Upgrade Now' → plan changes from Starter to Professional, pro-rata toast 'Pro-rata charge: GBP 1.79 (PO-2026-0006)' shown, REQUEST A DOWNGRADE section appears
feature_test_results.partner_downgrade_request: PASS — Click 'Request Downgrade' → dialog opens with plan selector and reason textarea → submit → success toast 'Downgrade request submitted. Your platform admin will review it.'
feature_test_results.partner_my_submissions_tab: PASS — Shows all submitted requests with status badges (Pending Review amber, Approved green, Rejected red), admin notes visible on resolved items, effective dates shown
feature_test_results.admin_receives_submissions: PASS — Partner Submissions tab shows all pending submissions from test partner with Partner, Type, From→To, Effective, Submitted, Status, Actions columns
feature_test_results.admin_approves_with_note: PASS — Click Approve → dialog opens with partner details + 'Approving will immediately apply plan change' warning → fill note → click Approve → 'Submission approved' toast → plan immediately changed
feature_test_results.partner_plan_reflects_approved_downgrade: PASS — After admin approval, partner's Plan & Billing shows Starter (GBP 29.99) — downgrade was applied immediately
feature_test_results.admin_rejects_submission: PASS — Click Reject → dialog opens → click Reject → 'Submission rejected' toast → submission removed from pending list
feature_test_results.filter_by_status: PASS — Status dropdown filters to pending/approved/rejected correctly
feature_test_results.api_partner_my_plan: PASS — Returns current_plan, license, subscription, available_plans with is_public validation
feature_test_results.api_partner_upgrade_plan: PASS — Creates pro-rata order, updates subscription, assigns plan to tenant license
feature_test_results.api_partner_submissions_create: PASS — Creates submission with pending status, effective_date = next 1st of month
feature_test_results.api_partner_submissions_list: PASS — Returns partner's own submissions only
feature_test_results.api_admin_partner_submissions_list: PASS — Platform admin sees all; partner admin sees own only (authorization working)
feature_test_results.api_admin_partner_submissions_approve: PASS — Approves, applies plan change to tenant and subscription
feature_test_results.api_admin_partner_submissions_reject: PASS — Rejects, status set to rejected
feature_test_results.api_already_resolved_400: PASS — Returns 400 for re-resolving already resolved submission
feature_test_results.api_partner_cannot_approve: PASS — Returns 403 for partner trying to approve/reject

action_items: OPTIONAL: Backfill Free Trial plan with monthly_price=0, currency='GBP' for schema consistency. Currently shows '—' in Plans table which is acceptable but could be confusing.
INFO: All Phase 3 & 4 features are working correctly. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: Free Trial plan in DB is missing monthly_price/currency fields (legacy seed data). GET /api/admin/plans returns it without these fields. New plans created via the API/UI do include them correctly.

NOTE: PartnerSubmissionsTab - status filter Select component has data-testid on the wrapper, but the actual trigger button's is_visible check may return false in Playwright. This is a testability concern only — functionally the filter works correctly.
GOOD: Admin approve dialog correctly shows warning 'Approving will immediately apply the plan change to [partner]' — good UX affordance.
GOOD: Pro-rata toast message includes specific order number (e.g. PO-2026-0006) — good for partner traceability.
GOOD: Authorization is correct: partner admin gets 403 on PUT /admin/partner-submissions/{id}; admin GET /admin/partner-submissions returns only partner's own submissions for non-platform admins.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* submissions created during testing runs. Test partner plan was upgraded to Professional then downgraded back to Starter. Current state: test-partner-co is on Starter plan.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 & 4 fully verified. Backend 27/27 tests pass. All frontend flows work: admin login, Plans tab (monthly_price column, Public badge, edit modal), partner login (test-partner-co), Plan & Billing tab (current plan card, upgrade, downgrade request), My Submissions (status badges, admin notes), admin Partner Submissions (approve/reject with notes, status filter, plan change propagation). Free Trial plan is missing monthly_price/currency in DB (legacy seed, minor). Test partner is currently on Starter plan. Multiple test submissions in DB (TEST_* prefixed) from automated testing runs.
